title: Authentication with Email and Password - Success
description: Verify that a user can successfully log in using valid email and password credentials.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page.
Input valid registered email address and correct password.
Click the login button.
Verify the user is redirected to their respective role-based dashboard.

title: Authentication with Email and Password - Failure
description: Verify that login fails with incorrect email or password and an appropriate error message is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page.
Input wrong email or password.
Click the login button.
Check that login is denied and error message indicating invalid credentials is displayed.

title: Authentication using Google Sign-in - Success
description: Verify that a user can successfully authenticate via Google sign-in and is redirected to their dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page.
Click on the 'Sign in with Google' button.
Complete Google OAuth sign-in flow with a valid Google account.
Verify that user is authenticated and redirected to the appropriate role-based dashboard.

title: User Registration with Valid Data
description: Verify new users can successfully sign up by providing valid details including email, password, full name, and role selection.

steps.description: Navigate to the signup page.
Input valid email, strong password, full name, and select role as deaf/mute or interpreter.
Submit the signup form.
Verify user account is created and user is redirected to their dashboard.

title: User Registration with Missing Fields
description: Verify that signup fails with missing required fields and appropriate validation messages appear.

steps.description: Navigate to the signup page.
Submit the signup form with missing email or password or role.
Check that validation errors are displayed for required missing fields.

title: Immediate Session Booking by Deaf/Mute User
description: Verify deaf/mute users can successfully book an immediate session with an available interpreter.

steps.description: Log in as deaf/mute user.
Navigate to the session booking page.
Select an interpreter and choose session type as 'immediate'.
Submit the booking request.
Verify that the session request is sent and interpreter receives notification.

title: Scheduled Session Booking by Deaf/Mute User
description: Verify deaf/mute users can book a session for a future scheduled time with an interpreter.

steps.description: Log in as deaf/mute user.
Navigate to session booking page.
Select interpreter and choose 'scheduled' session with a valid future datetime.
Submit the booking.
Check the session is created and interpreter receives the session request with scheduled time.

title: Interpreter Accepts Session Request
description: Verify that interpreters can accept pending session requests and the user is notified.

steps.description: Log in as an interpreter.
Navigate to session requests page.
Select a pending session request and click 'Accept'.
Verify the session status updates and deaf/mute user receives acceptance notification.

title: Interpreter Rejects Session Request
description: Verify that interpreters can reject session requests and the user is notified accordingly.

steps.description: Log in as interpreter.
Go to session requests page.
Reject a pending session request.
Confirm that session is marked rejected and deaf/mute user is notified.

title: Join Video Call via PeerJS
description: Verify both deaf/mute user and interpreter can join the video call session successfully using PeerJS peer IDs.

steps.description: After session acceptance, both parties click join call.
Check that PeerJS establishes connection and both audio and video streams are active.

title: Video Call Controls Functionality
description: Verify mute/unmute audio, toggle camera on/off, screen sharing, and end call controls work as intended during a video call.

steps.description: During an active video call, test mute and unmute audio buttons.
Confirm audio is muted and unmuted correctly for both participants.
Toggle camera off and on.
Verify video feed is disabled and re-enabled accordingly.
Activate screen sharing.
Check shared screen is visible to the other participant.
Click the end call button.
Confirm the call disconnects gracefully for both parties.

title: Automatic Cleanup on Video Call Error or Disconnect
description: Verify the system handles video call errors and disconnections gracefully and performs cleanup of resources.

steps.description: Simulate network interruption during a video call.
Verify error is logged and user is shown error notification.
Check that the call resources are released automatically and UI resets to pre-call state.

title: Interpreter Availability Schedule Management
description: Verify that interpreters can view, set, update, and save their weekly availability schedule.

steps.description: Log in as interpreter.
Navigate to availability settings page.
Set availability for selected days and mark full-day or specific time slots.
Save the updates.
Confirm saved availability is persisted and displayed correctly on reload.

title: In-app and Push Notifications for Session Updates
description: Verify that users receive timely in-app and push notifications for booking confirmations, session start reminders, and updates.

steps.description: Perform booking of a session.
Verify interpreter receives notification of new session request.
Accept the session as interpreter.
Verify deaf/mute user receives acceptance notification.
At scheduled session time, verify both users receive reminders.

title: Rating and Feedback Submission Post Session
description: Verify that deaf/mute users can rate and provide feedback for interpreters after session completion and that ratings are saved.

steps.description: Complete a video session between deaf/mute user and interpreter.
As deaf/mute user, open rating modal and submit a star rating and optional feedback.
Confirm rating and feedback are saved and retrievable.

title: Role-based Dashboard Displays Correct Information
description: Verify that the dashboard displays accurate session information, notifications, and summaries tailored to deaf/mute users and interpreters respectively.

steps.description: Log in as deaf/mute user.
Verify dashboard shows upcoming sessions, session history, and notifications relevant to deaf/mute user.
Log out and log in as interpreter.
Verify dashboard shows pending requests, accepted sessions, availability status, and relevant notifications for interpreter.

title: Migration Validation from Agora to PeerJS - Video Call Stability
description: Verify that migration to PeerJS is successful and video calling works reliably over stable peer-to-peer connections without Agora dependencies.

steps.description: Initiate multiple video call sessions between users.
Confirm calls connect successfully, maintain stable video and audio, and no Agora SDK is involved.

title: Session Booking with Invalid Scheduled Time
description: Verify that the system rejects session booking attempts with scheduled times in the past or invalid format and shows appropriate validation errors.

steps.description: Attempt to book a scheduled session with a past datetime or invalid date format.
Validate that the booking fails and error message specifies invalid scheduled time.

title: Notification Read Status Update
description: Verify that users can mark notifications as read and the read status updates persistently.

steps.description: Access notification center.
Mark a notification as read.
Check that notification status is updated and does not appear as unread afterwards.

title: Concurrent Session Request Handling
description: Verify system correctly handles multiple simultaneous session requests sent to a single interpreter with consistent state updates.

steps.description: Simultaneously book multiple sessions with the same interpreter from different deaf/mute users.
Ensure interpreter sees all pending requests without conflict and can accept/reject them individually.
